title: [BPOP]Botany Pots Ore Planting
description: This is a Mod that can grow minerals.
body:
![Minecraft Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CH8ZMjgi/images/faf087fcccd882bd698b8d92895a4e8d600eb5e0.png)
---
This mod is an unofficial expansion mod for [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots), so Botany Pots is required as a prerequisite (For Minecraft version 1.18.2 and above, [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) is also required);  
This mod allows you to grow ores using Botany Pot!  

You can grow the following ores from Minecraft: Iron, Coal, Gold, Copper, Redstone, Lapis Lazuli, Diamond, Emerald, and Ancient Debris;  
As well as Copper and Zinc from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)!  
## How to grow?
Please use the following seeds and soil with the Botany Pot.  
+ Seed: Corresponding mineral ingot (except for certain special ores);  
+ Soil: Corresponding mineral block (except for certain special ores).  
## Growth Time and Output
+ Growth Time: 1 minute for all;  
+ Output Quantity: 1 to 2 items (for mod version 15.0.0 and later) or 2 to 3 items (for mod versions prior to 15.0.0) (except for certain special ores);  
+ Product: The item dropped when the corresponding mineral ore is mined.  

# Supported Mod Ores
Not only Minecraft's native ores, this mod also adds ores from other mods!  
+ **Minecraft**
+ **Create**
+ **Mekanism**
+ **Ice and Fire: Dragons**
+ **Gobber**
+ **Botania** and **MythicBotany**
+ **Draconic Evolution**
+ **Thermal Series**
+ **Immersive Engineering**
+ **Tinkers' Construct**
+ **TAIGA 2 (Tinkers alloying addon port)**
+ **Ars Nouveau**
+ **Tinkers' Archery**
+ **Pixelmon**
+ **Mythic Metals**
+ **All the Ores**
+ **Powah!** and **Powah! (Rearchitected)**
+ **Allthemodium**

For more supported mods, please check the more detailed [<u>ModOreSupportList.md</u>](https://github.com/mango-buff/BotanyPotsOrePlanting/blob/main/ModOreSupportList.md) file on GitHub.

# Version Support
| **Minecraft Version** | **Forge** | **Fabric** | **NeoForge** |  
|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|  
| **1.16.5** | **<font color=#FFC000>Stop adding ore for new mods</font>** | / | / |  
| **1.18.2 ~ 1.20.4** | **<font color=green>Continuous updates</font>** | **<font color=green>Continuous updates</font>** | / |  
| **1.21.1** | / | **<font color=green>Continuous updates</font>** | **<font color=green>Continuous updates</font>** |  

**File names ending with xxx+1.18.2-1.20.4 are applicable for Minecraft versions 1.18.2 to 1.20.4.**

# Other Notes
+ If you find any bugs related to this mod or have suggestions for adding new mod ores, please provide feedback here: [Issues · Mango buff/BotanyPotsOrePlanting](https://github.com/mango-buff/BotanyPotsOrePlanting/issues);  
+ This mod merely adds some recipes, so theoretically, it should not cause crashes or conflicts with other mods;  
+ You **<font color=#green>may</font>** include this mod in modpacks.
